summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Industries section feature. All core functionality working correctly with minor mobile navigation scroll tolerance issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile Industries link scrolls close to but not exactly to Industries section (within 100px tolerance)

passed_tests: Industries section renders with correct heading 'Deep expertise where compliance isn't optional.'
All 4 industry cards visible: Construction, Financial Services, Manufacturing, High-Compliance Industries
Each industry card displays correct compliance/capability tags
Desktop navigation 'Industries' link scrolls to industries section correctly
Footer 'Industries' link scrolls to industries section correctly
Hero subhead includes updated text about trusted firms in financial services, manufacturing, and high-compliance industries
Industries section is responsive on mobile (single column layout)
Mobile navigation menu opens and Industries link is accessible
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (8/8 core features working, 1 minor mobile scroll tolerance issue)
